narrative:
Owensville Village (precinct in Clermont County) has 450 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.4 percentage points.
